news.t: Unlocking Smart Beta Innovation: TMX VettaFi to Acquire RAFI Indices

holdings.infoBox: MFUS is an equity ETF with a total of 860 individual holdings. The top holdings are Intel stock at 3.22%, Walmart at 1.96%, Broadcom at 1.83%, Johnson & Johnson at 1.80%, and Citigroup at 1.62%.

overview.description: The PIMCO RAFI Dynamic Multi-Factor U.S. Equity ETF (MFUS) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the RAFI Dynamic Multi-Factor U.S. index. The fund tracks an index of US companies that are selected and weighted by a combination of fundamental and technical factors. MFUS was launched on Aug 31, 2017 and is issued by PIMCO.

data.title: Unlocking Smart Beta Innovation: TMX VettaFi to Acquire RAFI Indices
data.text: VettaFi's core mission is to provide the index and distribution solutions that help asset managers build, grow, and navigate the markets with precision. Last week we took a massive, transformational s...
